about.title: About
about.subtitle: Passionate about technology, driven by knowledge sharing.
about.description: Freelance developer based in France, I design and build custom digital solutions. My approach: understand first, code second. I invest in each project as if it were my own, with rigor and pragmatism.
about.description2: Beyond code, I share my passion for tech through my YouTube channel AyLabs — smart home, 3D printing, homelab and more.
